name: UR5 Robot Arm
description: Joint control for the UR5 robotic arm via ROS trajectories

subcategory_hints.UR5 Arm: Use Move All Joints for coordinated multi-joint motion with trajectory planning. Use Move Single Joint for controlling one joint at a time.

blocks.ai_description: Move all 6 UR5 joints simultaneously to target positions (radians) over a duration using trajectory planning.
blocks.ai_example: { type: "ur5_move_joints", shoulder_pan: 1.57, shoulder_lift: -0.5, elbow: 1.0, wrist_1: 0, wrist_2: 0, wrist_3: 0, duration: 2 }

definition.tooltip: Move UR5 joints to specified positions using Trajectory Message

blocks.ai_description: Move one UR5 joint directly to a position (radians) using position control.

definition.tooltip: Move a single UR5 joint directly using Position Control
